creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Christoph,

Am 08.03.12 18:37, schrieb Christoph Theis:
> But with the next update I will display a message hinting users at using
> .local files, as you suggested. I won't do a patch right now, there is
> no need to push an update for a better message what to do in case of
> updates ...

thanks a lot.

Matthias
